pos_sentences.text: You got good opportunity after the course with a minimum salary of 70-80k per month
pos_sentences.name: Raghav singh

pos_sentences.text: I really liked how profesor and other faculty are dedicated to their profession and they really helpful to teach us
pos_sentences.name: Raghav singh

pos_sentences.text: The course is really good and you can learn a wide variety of things
pos_sentences.name: Raghav singh

neg_sentences.text: That's it no more issues problem are everywhere and all they can be solved
neg_sentences.name: Raghav singh

neg_sentences.text: The infrastructure of college campus is little bit damaged and it need to be improved
neg_sentences.name: Raghav singh

neg_sentences.text: The canteen food is not good and the canteen is also small
neg_sentences.name: Raghav singh
